---
title: "main-functions"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{main-functions}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(auditr)
```


```{r}
plastic_proportions(plastics_clean, country = "Argentina", year = 2019)
```

This should make a summary table of the proportions of each plastic type over all companies found in the Argentina audits for the year 2019.


```{r}
plot_plastic_gdp(plastics_clean, year = 2020)
```

This function should plot the total plastic count versus the gdp for each country for the year 2020. There should be one point for each country in the data.
